title: tephrosia major
intro: Tephrosia major, also known as Horsefly Tree or Bushman's Tea, is a plant species native to South Africa and other parts of the world. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tephrosia major include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Tephrosia major can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and it is also used topically in the form of a cream or ointment to treat skin conditions.
